design_decisions.d0_open_oeq_residuals: Open-ended question(s) left as the note's acknowledged open problem for D0.5 review: oeq:exact-nested-minimax

proposed_from.topic: Optimal Chebyshev-spaced rollout measurement schedule and minimax linear-unbiased total-treatment-effect estimation under β-order network interference (Cortez et al. 2024, arXiv:2405.05119): over a Sobolev-ellipsoid β-order coefficient class, WHICH treated-fractions to roll out to is the design variable; the optimum is Chebyshev-spaced, and the minimax linear-unbiased estimator attains a worst-case design-variance β-exponent (C_s(c)/q)^{2β} with a matching lower bound from the classical Chebyshev extremal property — resolving whether Cortez et al.'s (β/q)^{2β} interpolation-variance penalty is intrinsic (exponential ORDER 2β fixed, BASE reducible via additional measurement points k=⌈cβ⌉)

accepted_scope_caveats.label: thm:tv-envelope-design / ass:round-mean-variance-envelope
accepted_scope_caveats.caveat: The optimal-node theorem is conditional on the novel TV round-mean variance envelope rather than deriving that envelope from primitive graph/local-dependence assumptions.
accepted_scope_caveats.bound_claim: The accepted headline is a field-tier optimal schedule theorem for the TV-envelope surrogate, not an unconditional exact covariance theorem.

accepted_scope_caveats.label: oeq:exact-nested-minimax / honest_scope
accepted_scope_caveats.caveat: Exact optimality for the true monotone-rollout covariance Gamma_P(p) is posed only as an open-ended question.
accepted_scope_caveats.bound_claim: The accepted conditional claim excludes equality between the TV-envelope minimax program and R_exact(beta,k,q).

banked_reason: Matched two-sided Chebyshev-Lobatto minimax over the TV-envelope rollout-node-placement design problem (base rho(q)/q, field tier); both substrate gates (Ehlich-Zeller/Bernstein-Szego + finite-dim l1/linf duality) proven 0-sorry axiom-clean via study sub-pipelines.
